name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BB172: Miu Miu new size briefcase, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a sophisticated multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, minimalist yet not simple. The new size offers better fit. Major fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 29X17X9cm (with original packaging)
